sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105320" key="tri/teixos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρίτειχος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105320.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with triple wall,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.265</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
